reproducibility: real repositories at pinned SHAs; line-precise; pin-or-drop

seed.sink: Response.set_cookie builds a cookie string from name/value/path/domain and stores it under Set-Cookie without rejecting CR/LF
seed.patched_shape: before store, raise ValueError when the cookie string contains CR or LF

heldout.sink: client header writer concatenates raw name and value with a CRLF terminator
heldout.patched_shape: _nocrlf strips CR/LF from both name and value before serialization

heldout.sink: multipart payload binary headers join raw keys and values with CRLF
heldout.patched_shape: both key and value pass through _safe_header before join

heldout.sink: FormData assigns a caller-supplied content_type into headers without rejecting CR/LF
heldout.patched_shape: raise ValueError when content_type contains CR or LF before assignment

heldout.drop_reason: fix sanitizes name/value at merge time with no changed header-serialization sink line; a serialize-or-Set-Cookie rule cannot line-precisely discriminate it
JavaScript Content-Language sanitization; current detector is Python-only
Elixir multipart Content-Type param validation; current detector is Python-only
